channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-23
item.description:
Our community has seen significant progress across multiple projects recently. The **Davidvandijcke/coarse** project has made notable strides, with localization updates and deployment fixes on the 'dev' branch, which have now been merged into the 'main' branch. Meanwhile, **JamieCummins/regcheck** has focused on bug fixes and security hardening on its "staging" branch, enhancing the overall stability of the project. Interestingly, **giladfeldman/escicheck** has synchronized changes from the `escicheckapp` repository, incorporating updates from `effectcheck` versions 0.6.4 and 0.6.5, demonstrating the interconnectedness of our projects. These updates showcase the community's commitment to improvement and collaboration, and we look forward to seeing the continued growth and development of these initiatives.

90 commits across 6 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: output-it-forward

Most active:

coarse30 commits
regcheck30 commits
docpluck19 commits
metacheck7 commits
escicheck3 commits

item.title: output-it-forward: activity update
item.description:
giovannacdelsordo/output-it-forward

The `main` branch was updated with a commit that added a Chrome Webstore link for OIF, as stated in the commit message "Add Chrome Webstore link for OIF". No other branches were worked on in this set of commits. This specific change adds a link to the Chrome Webstore, presumably to make it easier for users to access or install the OIF extension. The commit does not mention any other changes or additions beyond the Chrome Webstore link. There are no other branches or commits to report on in this update.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
